title: AI Co-Pilot: Your Digital Employee is Here! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof explores how Anthropic's Claude Tag feature enables digital identity management and AI co-pilot functionality in workplace settings. The feature is positioned as a tool for employee interactions and data management in enterprise environments.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof looks at Anthropic's Claude Tag feature and its role in digital identity management within enterprise settings.
